targetRange.populationContext: Minimum eGFR for most GLP-1 receptor agonists

labs.clinicalContext: Monitor kidney function for dosing guidance and contraindications

labRequirements.specialPopulationNotes: Different GLP-1 receptor agonists have varying eGFR eligibility criteria: Lixisenatide, Semaglutide oral, Exenatide, Albiglutide require eGFR ≥30 ml/min per 1.73 m2; Liraglutide and Dulaglutide require eGFR ≥15 ml/min per 1.73 m2; Efpeglenatide requires eGFR 25-59.9 ml/min per 1.73 m2. Patients on dialysis may be excluded for some agents.
labRequirements.sourceSnippet: GLP-1 receptor agonist trials. Lixisenatide (ELIXA): kidney eligibility eGFR ≥30 ml/min per 1.73 m2... Liraglutide (LEADER): kidney eligibility eGFR ≥15 ml/min per 1.73 m2... Semaglutide injectable (SUSTAIN-6): kidney eligibility patients treated with dialysis excluded... Dulaglutide (REWIND): kidney eligibility eGFR ≥15 ml/min per 1.73 m2
